data.title: Charlie Munger's Top Pick Costco Reports Strong December Sales: Analysts Expect A 7% Jump In January
data.description: Costco (COST) reported strong sales for December and is expected to see a 7% jump in January 2025 core sales.

data.title: El Salvador's Nayib Bukele Says 'Maybe We'll All Get The Chance To Buy Bitcoin At A Discount' After DOJ Clears Sale Of Over 69K BTC
data.description: Nayib Bukele, President of El Salvador, suggested that Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) might soon be available at a reduced price.

data.title: Blackstone Invests $300 Million In AI Data Firm That Powers Elon Musk's xAI Supercomputer
data.description: DDN's technology is integral to major AI infrastructure projects, including the Colossus supercomputer by Elon Musk's xAI.

data.title: Nvidia's CES Setback Mirrors 2007 iPhone Launch, Says Dan Ives: 'Jensen Plays Chess While Others Are Playing Checkers'
data.description: NVIDIA shares fell 6.22% following Jensen Huang's CES 2025 keynote, prompting Dan Ives to draw parallels with Apple's iPhone launch in 2007.

data.title: Jensen Huang Is 'Dead Wrong' About Quantum Computing, D-Wave CEO Fires Back At Nvidia Boss: 'Happy To Meet With Jensen Any Time, Any Place, To Help Fill In These Gaps'
data.description: D-Wave CEO Alan Baratz criticized Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's assertion that practical quantum computing is 15-30 years away.
